cyRiskProfile.narrative: Mid-market discrete manufacturer with concentrated customer base and significant raw-material exposure. Inventory and revenue recognition (cut-off) are the most sensitive areas; management uses standard costing with periodic variance write-offs.

items.description: Steel and commodity input prices volatile through FY2024 — pressure on inventory valuation (LCM) and gross margin.
Top three customers represent ~58% of revenue; concentration risk on accounts receivable collectability.
Standard fraud risk over revenue recognition (period-end cut-off) per AU-C 240.
Excess and obsolete inventory reserve is a significant management estimate.

cyBusinessChanges.narrative: New plant ERP cutover in Q2 FY2024; CFO change in Q3 FY2024.

items.description: Implemented new ERP (cost accounting + inventory) at the Ohio plant in May 2024 — heightened IT-dependent control risk over inventory costing for the post-cutover period.
New CFO hired August 2024 (prior CFO retired).
Three-year supply agreement signed with a Tier-1 OEM in Q4 FY2024 — material contract assets to evaluate.

materiality.basis: Overall materiality = 5% of FY2024 pretax income ($9.0M). Performance materiality = 75% of overall. Clearly trivial threshold = 5% of performance materiality.
